summary: Preserves object spec that could not be resolved.
description: Unresolved Object is a diagnostic placeholder for Pd-style typed objects whose objectSpec cannot currently resolve to a native or extension object. It stays on the canvas so the user can edit or fix the object spec instead of losing the object.
runtimeBehavior: Runtime load and mutation stay successful, but the session diagnostics include an error describing the unresolved object spec. The object has no ports and incident edges are removed when a node is replaced with this placeholder.

params.description: Original objectSpec entered by the user.
Human-readable explanation of why the text could not be resolved.
Resolved or requested node kind candidate, when one exists.

example.title: Keep invalid object spec editable
example.description: The unresolved object remains visible with its original objectSpec and diagnostic message.
